book_1: A timeless classic with imaginative characters and a fascinating fantasy world.
Very creative and entertaining, though some parts felt confusing.
This book was boring and made no sense to me.
This book is garbage. I can't believe people actually like it.
book_2: A powerful novel with deep characters and emotional storytelling.
Jane Eyre is an inspiring protagonist and the writing is beautiful.
The pacing is too slow and many chapters drag on.
The story is frustrating and some characters are incredibly stupid.
